title: [codereview-P1] coap_server.h: missing includes for coap_resource, coap_packet, sockaddr in lichen_coap_respond declaration
description: The new declaration in coap_server.h uses types from zephyr/net/coap.h and zephyr/net/socket.h without including them. This will cause compile errors in files that include coap_server.h. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-qrs6
